---
title: "runecaster_audit.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\runecaster_audit.py"
loc: 72
complexity: 13
logic_score: 5.25
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 3.40
---

## Intent
The `runecaster_audit.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on RuneCasterAudit, __init__, _should_ignore, run. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via RuneCasterAudit, __init__, _should_ignore, run. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `RuneCasterAudit`
- `__init__`
- `_should_ignore`
- `run`
